exercises.audioScript: Will you be able to do this on time?
exercises.hindiScript: क्या तुम इसे समय पर कर पाओगे?
exercises.question: What did you hear? Choose the correct sentence.
options: They will be able to achieve this target.
They will be able to get this opportunity.
She is able to run fast.
Will you be able to do this on time?
exercises.answer: Will you be able to do this on time?

exercises.audioScript: I was able to fix this.
exercises.question: What did you hear? Choose the correct sentence.
options: We are able to work together.

options: He was not able to swim before.

exercises.hindiScript: हम इस challenge को स्वीकार कर पाए।

dictationPassage.text: Will you be able to do this on time? I was able to fix this. She is able to learn any language. We were able to correct our mistake. They will be able to get this opportunity.
dictationPassage.hindiTranslation: क्या तुम इसे समय पर कर पाओगे? मैं इसे ठीक कर पाया। वह किसी भी भाषा सीख पाती है। हम अपनी गलती सुधार पाए। वे यह मौका पा पाएंगे।
